# Aroma Events

> Private event space among the vineyards of Valle de Guadalupe, Baja California, Mexico, for weddings, wine dinners, corporate retreats, and private celebrations.

Aroma Events offers three distinct settings: the Vineyard Terrace (open-air, up to 200 guests), the Barrel Room (indoor, candlelit, up to 45 guests), and the Garden Courtyard (shaded, up to 90 guests).

## Location

Valle de Guadalupe, Ensenada, Baja California, Mexico — a short drive from Ensenada and the US-Mexico border.

## Event types

- Weddings (ceremonies and receptions)
- Wine dinners and tastings
- Corporate retreats
- Milestone celebrations (birthdays, anniversaries, reunions)
- Rehearsal dinners
- Private gatherings

## Contact

- Inquiry form: https://aromavalledeguadalupe.com/#inquire
